2603.26535.title: Stabilizing Rubric Integration Training via Decoupled Advantage Normalization
2603.26535.paper_summary: We propose Process-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO), a method that integrates process-level evaluation into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) through decoupled advantage normalization, to address two limitations of existing reward designs. Outcome reward models (ORM) evaluate only final-answer correctness, treating all correct responses identically regardless of reasoning quality, and gradually lose the advantage signal as groups become uniformly correct. Process reward models (PRM) offer richer supervision, but directly using PRM scores causes reward hacking, where models exploit verbosity to inflate scores while accuracy collapses. PAPO resolves both by composing the advantage from an outcome component Aout, derived from ORM and normalized over all responses, and a process component Aproc, derived from a rubric-based PRM and normalized exclusively among correct responses. This decoupled design ensures that Aout anchors training on correctness while Aproc differentiates reasoning quality without distorting the outcome signal. Experiments across multiple model scales and six benchmarks demonstrate that PAPO consistently outperforms ORM, reaching 51.3% vs.\ 46.3% on OlympiadBench while continuing to improve as ORM plateaus and declines.
2603.26535.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了過程感知政策優化（PAPO），這是一種通過解耦優勢標準化將過程級評估整合到群體相對政策優化（GRPO）中的方法，以解決現有獎勵設計的兩個限制。結果獎勵模型（ORM）僅評估最終答案的正確性，對所有正確的回答一視同仁，而不考慮推理質量，並隨著群體變得均勻正確而逐漸失去優勢信號。過程獎勵模型（PRM）提供了更豐富的監督，但直接使用PRM分數會導致獎勵黑客行為，模型利用冗長性來膨脹分數，而準確性卻崩潰。PAPO通過組合來自ORM的結果組件Aout（在所有回答上標準化）和來自基於評分標準的PRM的過程組件Aproc（僅在正確回答中標準化）來解決這兩個問題。這種解耦設計確保Aout在正確性上錨定訓練，而Aproc則在不扭曲結果信號的情況下區分推理質量。在多個模型規模和六個基準測試中的實驗表明，PAPO始終優於ORM，在OlympiadBench上達到51.3%對46.3%的結果，同時隨著ORM的平穩和下降而持續改進。
2603.26535.author: Zelin Tan et.al.
2603.26535.authors: Zelin Tan, Zhouliang Yu, Bohan Lin, Zijie Geng, Hejia Geng, Yudong Zhang, Mulei Zhang, Yang Chen, Shuyue Hu, Zhenfei Yin, Chen Zhang, Lei Bai
